description_long: This is a tall, freestanding coatrack made primarily of dark metal, featuring a central vertical pole with ornate, curved hooks radiating outward at two levels. The upper section has multiple hooks for hanging coats, hats, or scarves, while the lower section includes additional hooks, likely for bags or umbrellas. The base consists of four elegantly curved legs that provide stability and a decorative touch. A small, round finial tops the central pole, adding a classic accent. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, with a Victorian-inspired aesthetic. One of the hooks is shown holding a black hat, demonstrating its intended use.
description: A tall, ornate metal coatrack with multiple curved hooks and a decorative base, finished in black. It features both upper and lower hooks for hanging various items and a classic finial on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the coatrack's profile, with curved hooks and a black hat hanging on one of the upper hooks.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of hooks and the central pole, with the hat visible on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the hooks from a different angle and the hat now on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the coatrack, with the hooks and base structure clearly visible, and the hat mostly obscured.
